text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oooh! I suddenly feel so much more powerful!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's like cherry blossoms are budding inside me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe this means I'll be able to burst into full
bloom any day now! I have to go tell Trainer!
